name: Room No. 9
overview: Eulji Hae-Yi, a lawyer at a big law firm, is a kiss-up to those with power, but looks down upon those who are poor. When she meets death-row convict Jang Hwa-Sa in room 9 in the prison visitation area, their bodies are exchanged.

trailers.title: Room No. 9 | Official Trailer | CJ ENM
